title: SavePoints Method, Spel Class
parameters: FileName	The file name to save the points to in the current project.
description: Save points for the current robot into a file.
see_also:
LoadPoints

SavePoints Example

VB Example:

With m_spel

  .SavePoints("part1.pts")

End With

C# Example:

m_spel.SavePoints("part1.pts");
